best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for highest quality, nuance, and large context; use open when data privacy, cost control, or self-hosting are required
Use closed for IDE integration and autocomplete at scale; use open for air-gapped environments or cost-sensitive batch generation

best_tools.best_closed: OpenAI API + embeddings, Cohere Command R+
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for production SLAs and managed vector search; use open when documents are sensitive or on-premise deployment is mandatory

best_tools.best_closed: OpenAI Assistants API, Vertex AI Agents
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for reliable tool use and managed orchestration; use open for custom workflows, cost reduction, and full control over agent logic

best_tools.best_closed: Perplexity Pro, ChatGPT with Search, Gemini with Grounding
best_tools.best_open: SearXNG + Llama 3, Ollama + Open WebUI (web plugin)
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for real-time cited web answers; use open for internal enterprise knowledge base search with privacy requirements
Use closed for highest quality and ease of use; use open for full control, custom fine-tuning, and commercial IP ownership
Use closed for production-quality short video generation; use open for research, custom pipelines, and no content policy restrictions

best_tools.best_closed: OpenAI TTS / Whisper API, Azure Speech Services
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for scalable managed transcription/synthesis; use open for offline processing, custom voice cloning, and sensitive audio data
Use closed for tightly integrated OS-level features; use open for custom embedded apps, IoT, and privacy-first mobile deployments

best_tools.best_closed: OpenAI Fine-tuning API, Vertex AI Supervised Tuning
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for managed, low-ops domain adaptation; use open for full model ownership, sensitive training data, and iterative experimentation
Use closed for complex vision-language reasoning and document understanding; use open for self-hosted image analysis pipelines with data privacy needs
